title: Post-008 Resumed Feature-Delivery Readiness Gate
objective: Consume the published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 008 authority chain and select the smallest truthful bounded Olares-hosted implementation or validation slice that can run next before broader product delivery is reopened.
active_role: Olares Developer Residency Readiness Gate Operator
dependency_note: Packet 008 confirmed the client-only laptop posture at published parent-root commit `08839ae08506a55cc0b1d64f19a3e2a984377f28`, while post-packet evidence also confirmed that Olares exposes a browser-delivered desktop UI without yet evidencing a VS Code desktop app. The next truthful move is a readiness gate selecting one bounded host-executable follow-on slice rather than reopening broader product delivery by assertion.
required_inputs: Published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 008 authority chain
Current operations-web scripts and deployment validation runbook
Current host evidence that Node, explicit pnpm, the control-plane smoke script, and Playwright tooling are invocable on Olares without new installation work
decision_requirements: Treat Remote-SSH as the baseline-safe client path for the next slice.
Admit the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI only as an optional host-supported client surface, not as the controlling runtime anchor.
Prefer the smallest host-executable slice that uses already admitted tooling and avoids new install or browser-runtime provisioning work.
Keep broader product delivery closed until the selected slice executes and its result is recorded.
Do not authorize host-local VS Code desktop installation as a prerequisite for the selected slice.
explicit_no_go_items: broader product delivery reopening by assertion
new host installs or package-manager bootstrap
decision_rationale: `apps/operations-web` is the default business follow-on named by the cutover milestone and technical plans.
The Olares host can already invoke the public control-plane smoke script, explicit pnpm, and Playwright tooling without new install work.
No Playwright browser cache is currently evidenced on the host, so the full promoted-host browser-plus-seam wrapper is not the smallest truthful next slice under the no-new-install boundary.
The smallest executable follow-on is therefore the public control-plane backend seam plus hosted-route smoke against the already promoted `operations-web` and control-plane hosts.
Remote-SSH remains the baseline-safe client path while the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI stays admitted only as an optional host-supported surface for later comparison work.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 010 - Bounded Operations-Web Backend Seam And Hosted Route Validation Execution
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as the post-008 resumed feature-delivery readiness gate. Packet 009 selected the smallest truthful next slice as bounded `operations-web` backend-seam plus hosted-route validation from the Olares host against the already promoted public targets, while keeping broader product delivery closed until that slice executes. Packet 009 did not open browser-runtime provisioning, host-local VS Code desktop installation, package or lockfile mutation, runtime or service mutation, public ingress widening, AI-services expansion, Gitea or canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, or old-clone mutation.
next_action: Execute `Olares Dev Residency 010 - Bounded Operations-Web Backend Seam And Hosted Route Validation Execution` as the selected host-executable follow-on slice before broader product delivery is reopened.
